paper_title: Bag of Dims: Training-Free Mechanistic Interpretability via Dimension-Level Sign Patterns

claims.claim: 标准基（standard basis）足以作为无需训练的特征基——每个维度通过符号编码语义内容，通过幅值编码置信度

evidence.evidence_text: Individual dimensions encode semantic content via their signs (+1/-1) and confidence via their magnitudes, functioning as independent binary registers.
Sign-only prediction (sign(h)·W) preserves 60-93% top-5 accuracy across architectures — 800 loudest dims beat all dims

claims.claim: 纯符号匹配（无LM头）就能达到80-90% top-4096预测准确率

evidence.evidence_text: Pure Hamming prediction without the LM head achieves 80-90% top-4096 across all architectures with zero learned parameters

claims.claim: 维度之间独立——成对互信息 << 0.006 bits

evidence.evidence_text: Across all models and conditions, mean pairwise MI is below 0.006 bits (maximum possible: 1.0 bit). No pair exceeds 0.1 bits.
evidence.experiment_reference: Table 3: Qwen type-level 0.0014, Gemma 0.0011, Mistral 0.0051, Qwen3-32B 0.0014 bits

evidence.evidence_text: MLP ablation: an MLP with full cross-dimension capacity (128 hidden units) adds zero AUC over per-dim logistic regression at any training scale
evidence.experiment_reference: Appendix B Table 21: MLP never outperforms LogReg, gap consistently negative

claims.claim: 从单token类型缓存中可无训练发现175个语义类别（逐维度 AUC 0.80，原型 AUC 0.98）

evidence.evidence_text: All 175 categories exceed null calibration on every model. Per-dim AUC 0.772-0.844, prototype AUC 0.975-0.993
evidence.experiment_reference: Table 4: Qwen per-dim 0.801→proto 0.980, Gemma 0.772→0.975, Mistral 0.844→0.993, Qwen3-32B 0.792→0.978

evidence.evidence_text: Probe comparison: trained logistic regression adds only +0.018 AUC, probe weights 99.9% sign agreement with polarity

claims.claim: 无监督发现可扩展到1500个特征（100%种子产生有效特征）

evidence.evidence_text: 1500/1500 features found on all four models, mean max-score 0.906, 100% scoring ≥0.80

claims.claim: 类型级原型在上下文中泛化——上下文 AUC 0.72-0.86

evidence.evidence_text: Type-level prototypes generalize to tokens in running text. Mean contextual AUC: 0.814 (Qwen), 0.722 (Gemma), 0.856 (Mistral)
Polysemy test: 77-80% accuracy on 3/4 models (Qwen 79%, Mistral 78%, Gemma 77%)

claims.claim: 因果符号翻转——翻转特征的注册符号在生成过程中抑制其概念（-5到-24 logits），仅当应用靠近输出层时有效

evidence.evidence_text: Away flip: -10 to -14 (Qwen), -19 to -24 (Gemma), -5 to -7 (Mistral), -5 to -9 (Qwen3-32B). Toward flip: ~0. Disjoint flip: ~0. Random: ~0.
evidence.experiment_reference: Table 8: causal sign-flip during live forward pass

evidence.evidence_text: Coalition is the causal unit: effect switches on past ~200-500 dimensions and grows with coalition size
Concept-specific: flipping disjoint coalition leaves target untouched, indistinguishable from random
evidence.experiment_reference: Table 32: Disjoint ≈ random across all models

claims.claim: 特征存活于注意力投影——K/V投影保留轴对齐结构

evidence.evidence_text: All 175 categories exceed null calibration on both K and V across all four architectures
evidence.experiment_reference: Table 9: K/V discoverability ranges 33-99% across models

claims.claim: FFN神经元写入轴对齐——Top-200神经元联盟通过多数投票重建99.9%的原型

evidence.evidence_text: At K=200, 99.9% of Qwen 3.5-4B prototypes exceed 0.70 agreement. Curve logarithmic for every model, climbing monotonically toward ~0.85-0.94
Random weights never achieve the linkage thresholds that trained models reach
evidence.experiment_reference: Table 11: Trained vs random: 0/1500 for random on all models

evidence.evidence_text: FFN neuron activations themselves are a sign-readable per-dim space: match residual stream within ±0.02 prototype AUC

claims.claim: 跨模态普遍性——相同结构出现在自监督视觉、有监督视觉和音频Transformer中

evidence.evidence_text: DINOv2 (self-supervised, no labels): 9/12 ImageNet superclasses detectable. ViT-Base (supervised): 11/12
AST (audio): 50/50 ESC-50 categories exceed AUC 0.70, 47/50 exceed 0.80
Sign-only 1-NN: DINOv2 93.0%, ViT-Base 96.0%, AST 97.0% accuracy
Probe ablation: MLP adds max +0.007 AUC over LogReg across modalities

claims.claim: 叠加假说的耦合是瓶颈压力的函数——真实Transformer不在该压力起作用的状态

evidence.evidence_text: Capacity = 3^D - 1 features, effectively infinite for D=2560. Cross-dim MI << 0.006 bits (real) vs 0.05-0.10 (toy bottleneck). As toy bottleneck relaxes, MI drops to 0.005 bits.
evidence.experiment_reference: Appendix F Tables 27-28: Toy model analysis

claims.claim: 发现结构需要训练——随机初始化模型不产生可检测的特征

evidence.evidence_text: Random-init models: Qwen AUC 0.608 (vs trained 0.801), Gemma 0.603 (vs 0.763), Mistral 0.679 (vs 0.844). Discoverable ≥0.75: 0/175 for Qwen and Gemma, 11/175 for Mistral (all incoherent)

claims.claim: D/V比率控制逐维度清晰度——Mistral (0.13) > Qwen3-32B (0.034) > Qwen 3.5-4B/Gemma (0.010)

evidence.evidence_text: Mistral (D/V≈0.13) achieves 0.844, Qwen3-32B (0.034) and Qwen 3.5-4B (0.010) reach 0.792-0.801, Gemma (0.010) reaches 0.772
Qwen3-32B polysemy near chance at every layer (AUC 0.60-0.67), linked to low D/V=0.034
